strategy: He sits under a -100% Fortify aura, and every damage spell you land (wands included) knocks that aura down 10% toward -10% — so chip him with cheap hits and wands first, then unload your big hit once the aura is nearly gone.
Don't Feint him (a minion just takes the trap) and don't DoT him (he Shifts the tick back to you); Ghoul-type health-steal hits don't erode the aura, so use plain direct damage to lower it.
Cast Globals and Heals sparingly — either triggers Doom & Gloom -75%. If you must heal, Strangle him first, then cast a Global to heal safely.
Attack with any non-Death school (he resists Death 80%); he is stunable, so stun to skip a turn.
Enter on time — late wizards eat a +75% Feint, +25% Curse, and +35% Hex.
cheatNotes: Late wizards eat a +75% Feint, +25% Curse, and +35% Hex — enter on time or your first hit takes big bonus damage.
Feint on MacDeath (including Mass Feint) gets moved onto a minion — don't rely on Feint; kill the understudies or trap around them.
He carries a -100% Fortify aura, so your hits land reduced until you erode it (see next cheat).
Each damage spell you land drops his incoming-damage aura by 10%, down to -10% — chip him with cheap hits and wands first, then unload once the aura is nearly gone.
Weapon (wand) casts also erode the aura, so wand him each setup round to grind it down.
Health-steal hits like Ghoul do NOT erode the aura, so use plain damage for that job.
Any DoT tick on him gets Shifted back onto you — skip damage-over-time here.
Casting a Global or a Heal triggers Doom & Gloom -75%, gutting your healing — cast heals sparingly.
If you Strangle him and then cast a Global, you can heal without the -75% Doom & Gloom — the workaround for emergency heals.
He'll Beguile a wizard, turning them against the team for a turn — keep that in mind in group play.
